goal: 改进 draft intent 跨 worktree 可见性提示

summary.title: 提示跨 worktree draft 可见性
summary.what: 让 Mainline CLI 和 Hub 区分 current-worktree draft、sibling-worktree local draft、以及 synced shared proposed/merged state。show 在当前 worktree 和 synced view 都找不到 intent 时会扫描 sibling git worktrees 并返回可恢复路径；status 和 Hub 展示 sibling draft diagnostics 与 draft/shared visibility 边界。
summary.why: 用户在独立 git worktree 中创建 draft intent 后，从原 worktree 执行 show 或打开 Hub 会看不到该 draft，容易误判为 intent 丢失。draft 不应混入 shared review state，但同一 clone 的 sibling worktree draft 应可被诊断和定位。
summary.user_goal: 改进 draft intent 跨 worktree 可见性提示

decisions.point: 跨 worktree draft 的语义
decisions.chose: 把 sibling worktree draft 作为 local diagnostics 暴露，不并入 proposed/merged/review queue。
decisions.rationale: draft 没 seal/publish 前不是 shared truth；但同一 clone 的 worktree 通常属于同一用户，本机可发现性可以避免误判丢失。
rejected: 把 sibling draft 计入 shared review/proposed counts

decisions.chose: show miss 时扫描 git worktree list --porcelain，找到 draft 后返回 recoverable error 和可执行 cd/show/publish/sync 提示。
decisions.rationale: 比泛泛解释更可操作；agent 和人类都能直接切到创建 draft 的 worktree 或执行 publish/sync。
rejected: 只提示当前 .ml-cache/drafts 中没有该 intent

decisions.chose: Hub 在 CLI export/open 提供 source 时显示 repo、branch、last sync 和 draft 来源，并在 data JSON 中保留 metadata。
decisions.rationale: 静态 Hub 需要解释当前视图来源；底层 hub.Export 测试或库调用不应默认渲染伪 source。
rejected: 在 Hub 中假装所有 draft 都来自 shared view

decisions.chose: 比较 worktree path 前做 symlink canonicalization。
decisions.rationale: macOS temp path 可能出现 /var 与 /private/var 双形态；不 canonicalize 会把当前 worktree 误判为 sibling。
rejected: 直接字符串比较 git worktree path

rejected.alternative: 递归扫描用户目录寻找 .ml-cache/drafts
rejected.reason: 边界过大且容易扫到无关本地状态；Mainline 的本机发现边界应限于 git worktree list 返回的同 clone worktrees。

rejected.alternative: 把 sibling draft 合并进 Hub review queue
rejected.reason: draft 没有 seal/publish 前不能代表团队可 review 的正式 intent。

review_notes: 这是从正确 remote mainline-org/mainline 的 origin/main=a8b4a8d 重建的干净 intent；旧 int_e8c6e6b0 因曾基于错误 remote mainline-org/manlie 已 abandoned。
验证已跑 focused engine/hub/gitops/cli tests 与 git diff --check；未跑 PBT/full internal/engine。
Reviewer 重点看 sibling draft 是否始终保持 local diagnostics，不进入 proposed/review/shared counts。

architectural_claims: Sibling worktree draft discovery lives in engine/gitops and is exposed as local diagnostic state, not as shared Mainline view state.
Hub model carries source and sibling draft metadata explicitly so static rendering can explain view provenance without importing engine.
behavioral_changes: mainline show now surfaces a recoverable error when the requested draft exists in another git worktree of the same clone.
mainline status now lists sibling worktree drafts and suggests cd into the owning worktree for inspection.
mainline hub export/open now renders current-worktree drafts separately from sibling worktree draft diagnostics and annotates synced/shared-state visibility.

api_changes.signature: mainline status / mainline hub export JSON include sibling-worktree draft/source fields when available

data_model_changes.name: StatusResult.sibling_worktree_drafts
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Optional JSON field; absent when no sibling worktree drafts are found.

data_model_changes.name: HubModel.source / HubModel.sibling_worktree_drafts
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Optional metadata for static Hub export; shared intent view schema is unchanged.

security_implications: Hub source metadata may expose local absolute repo/worktree paths in the generated local static export; this is acceptable for Hub v1 local output and should not be blindly reused for hosted Hub v2.
migration_notes: No repository migration required; this only reads sibling worktree .ml-cache/drafts from git worktree list scope.
